prestazioni: 4G63T (7th-gen block, 85mm bore, 88mm stroke) forged internals: Tomei 272°/272° billet cams, JE 87mm forged pistons (12.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and Tomei Type-S head studs for 1.5-bar boost capability
Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GT3076R .82 A/R with TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, custom 3.5" stainless downpipe (no cat), and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 32psi on E85

Fuel system: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump, Radium Engineering dual catch can setup, and AEM 380LPH inline pump with -8AN feed/return lines to a Tomei 80mm titanium intake plenum
estetica: Voltex Type-5 front bumper with integrated carbon fiber canards (JDM-spec, no fog lights), custom 3D-printed ABS splitter with 30mm overhang for aero balance
Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fenders extended 50mm per side) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +15 wheels and 245/40/18 Yokohama AD08R tires

Full carbon fiber hood (Seibon dry carbon, 8kg weight reduction) with custom NACA ducts feeding the GT3076R intercooler, and a custom titanium bolt-on rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" Invidia N1 titanium tips
